summary: A left hero anchor frames the page while the main proof chart occupies the center and a right-side insight/proof stack sharpens interpretation.
composition_pattern: left anchor, center proof chart, right interpretation stack
support_structure: center dominant chart or comparison proof
when_to_use: The chart itself must do the heavy lifting
The slide needs a stronger market or proof-story rhythm than a simple KPI card layout
avoid_when: The hero KPI should remain the only dominant focal point
The page has no central proof chart
